rawMetricsPolicy: Raw metrics.json files are distributed as release assets, not committed under docs/.

hardwareProfiles.role: NPU accelerated v1.0 benchmark device class

scenarios.name: VLM Review NPU Benchmark (55009)
scenarios.description: VLM review benchmark on the NPU accelerated node.
scenarios.conclusion: All tested channel counts passed; verified stable capacity is at least 8 channels.
scenarios.conclusionZhCN: 全部测试路数通过；容量上限至少为 8 路

scenarios.name: No Safety Helmet NPU Benchmark (7463)
scenarios.description: No Safety Helmet single-algorithm capacity benchmark on the NPU accelerated node.
scenarios.conclusion: All tested channel counts passed; verified stable capacity is at least 16 channels.
scenarios.conclusionZhCN: 全部测试路数通过；容量上限至少为 16 路

scenarios.name: Pedestrian Detection NPU Benchmark (45626)
scenarios.description: Pedestrian detection single-algorithm capacity benchmark on the NPU accelerated node.
scenarios.conclusion: All tested channel counts passed; verified stable capacity is at least 16 channels.
scenarios.conclusionZhCN: 全部测试路数通过；容量上限至少为 16 路

scenarios.name: Pedestrian + No Safety Helmet Mixed NPU Benchmark (45626 + 7463)
scenarios.nameZhCN: 行人 + 安全帽双算法压测 (45626 + 7463)
scenarios.description: Mixed pedestrian detection and no-safety-helmet capacity benchmark on the NPU accelerated node.
scenarios.conclusion: All tested channel counts passed; verified stable capacity is at least 16 channels.
scenarios.conclusionZhCN: 全部测试路数通过；容量上限至少为 16 路

scenarios.name: No Safety Helmet x86 Baseline Benchmark (7463)
scenarios.nameZhCN: 安全帽算法 x86 基线压测 (7463)
scenarios.description: CPU-only x86 baseline comparison for the no-safety-helmet scenario.
scenarios.conclusion: Stable capacity is 7 channels; 8 channels exceeded the benchmark thresholds.
scenarios.conclusionZhCN: 容量上限：7 路；8 路开始不满足通过条件，原因：安全帽检测 7463: 关键链路延时ms 245.2ms，阈值 200ms; 安全帽检测 7463: 检测节点延时 217.3ms，阈值 150ms
